title: July 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 9''' is the 190th day of the year (191st in leap years), with 175 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[David Anthony Pizzuto]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Jimmy Smits]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Pamela Adlon]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 124|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 124]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Defense of Kamino]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Crucible (novel)|''Crucible'']] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Dark Disciple]]'' published in the U.K.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Stranger (episode)|The Stranger]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2017]] – "[[Bounty of Trouble]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2017]] – "[[Sands of Jakku]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2017]] – "[[BB-8 Bandits]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – "[[Devil's Deal]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise and Fall of the Galactic Empire]]'' published in the US.
*2024 – "[[Choice]]" aired on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 6|''Legacy of Vader'' 6]] published.
